Exceptional Dental Care, Always With a Smile.

Experience painless, advanced dental treatments from our highly skilled and caring doctors. We prioritize your comfort and understanding, offering free consultations to ensure the best care.

Book a Free Consultation Our Services

Our Key Services

Advanced and compassionate dental solutions tailored for you.

Painless Low-Level Laser Treatment

Utilizing advanced laser technology for incredibly smooth, painless, and effective procedures. Ideal for cavity treatments and ensuring thorough disinfection with maximum comfort.

Learn More →

Cavity Treatment

Gentle and effective fillings to restore your tooth's health and prevent further decay.

Root Canal Treatment (RCT)

Expert care to save your natural tooth, relieve pain, and restore function with precision.

Why Smile Dental Care?

We are committed to providing an exceptional, caring, and friendly dental experience.

Exceptional Patient Care

Your comfort and health are our top priorities. We treat every patient like family.

Skilled & Caring Doctors

Our team is highly skilled and explains every step, ensuring you feel confident and informed.

Advanced Technology

We use modern equipment, like low-level lasers, for painless and efficient treatments.

Free Consultation

We offer free initial consultations, focusing on patient care, not just profit.

Clean & Peaceful Atmosphere

Our clinic is designed to be a calm, clean, and welcoming space for all our patients.

Friendly Staff

From the front desk to the dental chair, our team is here to make you feel at ease.

What Our Patients Say

Real stories from our valued patients.

"🤩 Exceptional Dental Care & Smooth Procedure! ... The doctor is genuinely exceptional—possessing high skill and a wonderful, caring demeanor. ... Visit them once; you'll never consider going anywhere else!"

- Satisfied Patient

"The treatment was really good, and the doctor explained everything patiently. Also staffs are so friendly"

- Happy Patient

"...the doctor was polite, he accidentally cut my tongue during my RCT and casually said, “Sometimes the warrior is injured after the war,” without even apologizing. ... I would not return to this clinic and would not recommend it to anyone."

- A Previous Patient

Ready for a Healthier Smile?

Book your free consultation today. Our friendly team is ready to assist you. Fill out the form, and we'll get in touch to schedule your appointment at a convenient time.

Contact & Address

Basement, Joshi & Joshi Complex, 3rd St, opp. Kailash Nagar, opp. Zudio showroom, AVM Jyothi Nagar, Sakthi Nagar, Pappakurichi Kattur, Thanjavur, Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu 620019, India

097917 65077

www.smiledentalcaretrichy.com

Opening Hours

  • Monday-Saturday: 11:00 AM – 2:30 PM, 6:00 PM – 9:00 PM
  • Sunday: 6:00 PM – 8:30 PM

Providing exceptional, friendly, and advanced dental care in a clean and peaceful environment. Your smile is our passion.
